attributes.name: summary
attributes.description: Generate a comprehensive summary of the Instagram profile analysis including overall account performance, audience perception, content quality, engagement trends, and key strategic insights. Must return plain text only.

attributes.name: sentiment_label
attributes.description: Determine the dominant sentiment of the Instagram profile content. The value MUST strictly be one of: positive, neutral, or negative.

attributes.name: sentiment_score
attributes.description: Generate an overall sentiment confidence score between 0 and 1 based on captions, audience reactions, and content tone.

attributes.name: sentiment_breakdown
attributes.description: Provide a textual sentiment distribution summary including positive, neutral, and negative audience sentiment percentages.

attributes.name: engagement_score
attributes.description: Calculate an engagement quality score between 0 and 100 based on audience interaction and content performance.

attributes.name: engagement_metrics
attributes.description: Provide a textual summary of engagement metrics including average likes, comments, engagement rate, posting consistency, and interaction quality.

attributes.name: top_topics
attributes.description: List the most common content themes and discussion topics identified from the Instagram profile content.

attributes.name: audience_insight
attributes.description: Provide audience analysis including estimated demographics, audience behavior, interests, engagement patterns, and peak activity periods.

attributes.name: recommendations
attributes.description: Generate actionable recommendations to improve audience engagement, branding consistency, content quality, and social media growth.

attributes.name: charts_data
attributes.description: Provide chart-ready analytical summary data in text format for sentiment trends, engagement performance, and topic distribution.
